items.example: She went to the cinema last Saturday.
He came home very late last night.
We ate pho for breakfast this morning.
She drank two cups of coffee yesterday.
I saw a great film last night.
He bought a new phone last week.
She took the bus to work this morning.
He gave her a bouquet of flowers.
I got a message from my friend yesterday.
We had a wonderful time at the beach.
She said she was very tired.
He told me a funny joke.
I thought the movie was boring.
She knew the answer immediately.
They met at a cafe last year.
He found his lost keys under the sofa.
She made a delicious cake for the party.
He wrote a letter to his grandmother.
I read an interesting book last week.
She ran five kilometres in the park yesterday.
He spoke to the manager about the issue.
She left home early this morning.
I slept for ten hours last night.
He felt very happy after the exam.
The concert began at 8 p.m.
